source_file: C:/Users/asifm/Downloads/Complete training guide for the Snakitos AI chatbot (1).docx
opening_message: Hi! I’m the Snakitos AI Assistant. I can help you track orders, find snack deals, recommend snacks by taste or budget, and answer questions about delivery, payments, and refunds. What are you craving today — spicy, sweet, crunchy, or a mixed snack box?

conversion_rules.spicy_to_sweet_pairing: Want something sweet to balance the heat?
conversion_rules.below_free_shipping_template: You’re only Rs. {remaining} away from free delivery. Want recommendations under Rs. 500?
